rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes using only visible output features and concrete bounds from the requirement.
Use eq declarations to define boolean range predicates when expressing numeric bounds in guarantees.
generic_rules: Express numeric constraints as boolean predicates bound to visible outputs.
Use component type annexes for guarantees that depend only on port-level interfaces, not internal structure.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: guarantee "label": expression; must appear inside annex agree {** ... **};
eq name : bool = expression; for reusable boolean conditions in contracts.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent paths or implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
